mapper.select: SELECT id, name, address, description, time_zone, opening_time, closing_time, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted FROM rental_place WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, name, address, description, time_zone, opening_time, closing_time, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted FROM rental_place WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_place ( name, address, description, time_zone, opening_time, closing_time, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{address}, #{description}, #{timeZone}, #{openingTime}, #{closingTime}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_place SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, description = #{description}, time_zone = #{timeZone}, opening_time = #{openingTime}, closing_time = #{closingTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
